narrative:
Hill 4-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,428 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
